Instance Method# deviceInquiryDeviceNameUpdated(_:device:devicesRemaining:)

macOS

```
optional func deviceInquiryDeviceNameUpdated(
    _ sender: IOBluetoothDeviceInquiry!,
    device: IOBluetoothDevice!,
    devicesRemaining: UInt32
)
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/IOBluetooth/IOBluetoothDeviceInquiryDelegate/deviceInquiryDeviceNameUpdated(_:device:devicesRemaining:)#parameters)

`sender`Inquiry object that sent this delegate message.

`device`IOBluetoothDevice that was updated.

`devicesRemaining`Number of devices remaining to update.

## [Discussion](/documentation/IOBluetooth/IOBluetoothDeviceInquiryDelegate/deviceInquiryDeviceNameUpdated(_:device:devicesRemaining:)#Discussion)

A device name has been retrieved. Also indicates how many devices are left to be updated.
